## Summary

Describe the problem, the solution, and any user-visible change. Link the relevant issue.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior.
- [ ] Relevant Electron interactions were tested manually, or the limitation is explained below.
- [ ] Packaging was tested when build or release behavior changed.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots.
- [ ] Documentation reflects user-facing or contributor-facing changes.
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, generated output, or unrelated changes are included.

## Test details and limitations

List operating systems, commands, manual scenarios, and anything not tested.
